the_day_unfolds.light: Warm golden morning: safe, playful, and full of possibility, with only the first faint cool hint of weather changing.
Gold drains into storm blue-grey: wind rises, rain arrives, and the world becomes too large for Keen’s performed confidence.
Cold cove storm interrupted by warm crystal beacon: belonging reaches across distance before Keen knows its name.
Darkest storm and underwater blue-grey: fear nearly swallows the frame until the small aquamarine glow from Keen’s empty cuffs reveals courage already inside him.
Storm clears into washed, hopeful warmth: the world receives Keen, and the Aquamarine crystal recognizes his choice.
Golden-hour after-rain warmth: peaceful, funny, and safe, with wet leaves and aquamarine traces preserving the cost of the storm.
